meta.title: Strike Eagle scores air-to-air kill with a BOMB?!
meta.description:
In 1991, Air Force Capt. Tim Bennett was serving as a flight leader for the 335th Tactical Fighter Squadron out of Al Kharj Air Base in central Saudi Arabia, in support of Operation Desert Storm when he was called on to take out an Iraqi Mi-24 gunship attacking American Special Forces. 

Rather than using the AIM-9 Sidewinder on his wing... he opted to take out the airborne helicopter with a 2,000 pound bomb, scoring the fighter's only air-to-air kill to date. 

You can read the full story here: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/how-an-f-15e-shot-down-an-iraqi-gunship-with-a-bomb/

#f15 #f15e #strikeeagle #airpower #airforce #fighterjet #airpower
